LanguageData.VRecyclingE_NotWorking: This machine is not working at the moment
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Leaking: This reactive isotopack is leaking radiation
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_AlloySplitterOutputBlocked: Output slots of the alloy splitter would be blocked
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_AlloySplitterOutOfBounds: Output slots of the alloy splitter would be out of map bounds
